title: SlickPack
description: A complete PvP aesthetics pack, for optimal viewing comfort and ease of pvping in Minecraft!
body:
# lwkSlick PvP Overlay
A clean, minimal PvP texture pack focused on clarity, visibility, and smooth gameplay.

## ⭐ Overview
The lwkSlick PvP Overlay is a tight set of 16x textures for players who want a clean, dark-themed style without ditching the vanilla feel.
Built for competitive PvP — sharp item silhouettes, smaller utilities, and consistent readability when it actually matters.

![lwkSlick's PvP Overlay v2.0.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ZUBWqD5H/images/3f964c17cb743e9f45439e785c58f653884b96e2.png)

## 🎯 Features
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

#### PvP Enhancements
- Short, edged daggers — restyled swords that don't clutter your screen
- Smaller item models so utilities stay out of the way
- Low fire overlay so you can actually see while burning
- Small custom shield that keeps your view open
- Outlined ores for faster spotting while mining
- Clear water for full underwater visibility
- Clean potions & particles
- Custom crit + damage-heart particles

#### Visual Style
- Clean & minimal design
- Vanilla-adjacent item restyling
- Dark UI theme
- Balanced 16x textures
- Smooth tweaks that never get in your face

</details>

## 🔧 Mod Support Included
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Built-in textures for popular mods — no need to stack packs:
- AppleSkin — custom red saturation overlay
- Simple Voice Chat — dark, minimal, compact UI redesign
